---
title: "Mr Sillence"
---

## Mr Sillence

### Description

farmer

### Biography

He is mentioned in a letter of Charles Wooldridge to JBY in 1877 as bankrupt and  temporarily employed on business, and was probably the Sillence,  farmer of New Barn, mentioned as a dealer in carthorses, one of his tenants, by Sir William Heathcote [Awdry, <i>Heathcote</i> 186; Wooldridge outletters]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
